positive: A whimsical, highly detailed watercolor illustration of a bioluminescent forest scene. Glowing mushrooms, tiny fairies, and gentle forest spirits interact under a canopy of oversized, glowing leaves. Soft pastel palette, Studio Ghibli aesthetic, volumetric lighting, hyper-detailed, storybook illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grayscale, harsh lines
